title: megalastrum obtusum
intro: Megalastrum obtusum is a species of flowering plant in the family Ophioglossaceae, commonly known as the adder's tongue fern or moonwort family, which is a genus of rare and unusual ferns. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Megalastrum obtusum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to lower fever and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Megalastrum obtusum typically involve drying and processing the plant's leaves, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
